text:

All relevant information missing (where, when, who occured the "problem"). 

IF the user has a problem with the forum (assuming he is talking about the FreeBSD forum), the place to ask is in the forum. 

Forum FAQ:  http://forums.freebsd.org/faq.php 

This has nothing to do with the website.  Close this PR.
